introSection: Flying Turns was a wooden bobsled roller coaster previously located at Steeplechase Park in Brooklyn, New York, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened in spring 1934. By mid-July, approximately 180,000 people had ridden the roller coaster.

fullText:
Flying Turns was a wooden bobsled roller coaster previously located at Steeplechase Park in Brooklyn, New York, USA.

The ride opened in spring 1934. By mid-July, approximately 180,000 people had ridden the roller coaster.
